reference: IT WAS NOT CLEAR TO THIS INTERESTING GIRL IN WHAT MANNER SUCH A SACRIFICE AS THIS LAST WOULD BE REQUIRED OF HER BUT SHE SAW THE MATTER THROUGH A KIND OF SUNRISE MIST OF EMOTION WHICH MADE DANGER AS ROSY AS SUCCESS
text: It was not clear to this interesting girl in what manner such a sacrifice as this last would be required of her, but she saw the matter through a kind of sunrise mist of emotion, which made danger as rosy as success.
